home.heroTitle: Contact and Collections Automation with AI
home.heroSubtitle: DeepContact automates outbound call campaigns through AI voice agents. Greater reach, leaner structure, measurable results.
home.featuresSubtitle: A platform designed to replace manual contact processes with an autonomous, scalable, and results-driven system.
home.feature1Desc: Agents capable of holding natural conversations, handling objections, and recording results autonomously, without human intervention.
home.feature2Desc: The system operates within configured schedules without supervision. Every call is executed according to the parameters defined by the company.
home.feature3Desc: Up to 20 simultaneous calls per workspace, with a capacity of approximately 1,200 calls per hour and 9,600 per operating day.
home.feature4Desc: Access detailed metrics per campaign: contact rate, per-call results, data export, and full interaction history.
home.howSubtitle: DeepContact can be operational in a very short time. The implementation process is structured, guided by our team, and requires no technical expertise from the client.
home.step1Desc: Telephony infrastructure is defined and the AI voice agent is configured according to the client's use case, tone, and dynamic variables.
home.step2Desc: The contact list is uploaded in CSV format and operational parameters are configured: schedules, retries, and intervals between attempts.
home.step3Desc: The system executes calls autonomously. Results are monitored in real time from the platform and detailed reports are available at any time.
home.ctaTitle: Automate your contact operation with artificial intelligence
home.ctaDesc: Share your use case with our team and we will show you how DeepContact can integrate into your process in the shortest time possible.

about.heroSubtitle: We automate contact and collections with artificial intelligence so your company can reach more clients, in less time and at a lower operational cost.
about.missionText: Our mission is to transform the way companies communicate with their clients, using artificial intelligence that acts immediately, persistently, and in a highly personalized manner. We believe every contact is an opportunity, and that technology should maximize that opportunity without adding operational burden to teams.
about.visionText: We aim to become the reference platform for contact and collections automation in Latin America. Our goal is to redefine the industry standard by proving that traditional call center models and manual management can be replaced by AI-driven solutions that deliver better results with more efficient structures.
about.value1Desc: We don't insist more, we insist better. Every contact is designed to reach the right person at the right time with the right message, maximizing the chances of a positive response.
about.value2Desc: We don't layer AI on top of broken processes. We replace manual workflows at the root, building systems that operate autonomously and scale from day one.
about.value3Desc: Every decision we make is oriented toward reducing operational costs and increasing results. We don't measure success by activity, but by the real impact we generate on our clients' businesses.
about.teamSubtitle: A multidisciplinary team with experience in technology, product, and business development, focused on building AI solutions that generate real impact.

contact.faq1Question: How long does it take to implement DeepContact?
contact.faq1Answer: A basic implementation can be ready in 48 hours. More complex setups with custom integrations may take 1 to 2 weeks.
contact.faq2Question: Do I need technical knowledge to use the platform?
contact.faq2Answer: No. DeepContact is designed to be intuitive. Our team guides you through the entire setup and training process.
contact.faq3Question: Do you offer a free trial?
contact.faq3Answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all platform features.

howPage.heroSubtitle: An AI-powered outbound call automation platform designed to operate with precision, scale, and zero manual intervention.
howPage.overviewText: DeepContact enables the automation of outbound call campaigns through AI voice agents capable of autonomously contacting clients, sustaining natural and structured conversations, recording the results of each interaction in real time, and generating detailed reports and analytics per campaign. The platform operates continuously without human supervision, maximizing reach and operational efficiency across every contact process.
howPage.step1Subtitle: Telephony infrastructure and AI voice agent
howPage.step1Text: In this stage, the telephony infrastructure is defined and the AI voice agent is configured. The number from which the system will operate can be provisioned by DeepContact (USD 10 one-time setup + USD 0.35 per minute of use) or integrated via an existing SIP Trunk. The agent is designed to match the specific use case: identity, call objective, dynamic variables (name, amount, date, etc.), communication tone, and success criteria are all defined in this phase.
howPage.step1Detail1: Own phone number or SIP Trunk integration
howPage.step1Detail2: Custom AI voice agent with dynamic variables
howPage.step1Detail3: Full configuration and deployment by DeepContact
howPage.step2Text: Once the infrastructure is in place, the contact list is uploaded in CSV format including phone numbers and the dynamic variables required to personalize each call. Operational campaign parameters are then configured: enabled calling days and time windows, maximum retry attempts per contact, intervals between attempts, and start mode — either manual or automatic based on predefined conditions.
howPage.step3Subtitle: Autonomous operation, real-time monitoring and reporting
howPage.step3Text: With the campaign active, the system executes calls autonomously within the defined parameters. The platform provides real-time visibility into the status of each call, detailed per-campaign analytics, and result export for further analysis or integration with external systems. Each workspace supports up to 20 simultaneous calls, representing a capacity of approximately 1,200 calls per hour and up to 9,600 calls per day in an 8-hour operating window.
howPage.step3Detail1: Real-time monitoring of each call status
howPage.step3Detail2: Detailed analytics and metrics per campaign
howPage.step3Detail3: Results export for integration or external analysis
howPage.capacity3Label: Calls per day in an 8-hour window
howPage.weDoText: DeepContact manages the entire technical configuration of the system. Clients require no infrastructure or telephony expertise — our team handles every stage of the implementation process through to operational platform delivery.
howPage.weDo3: AI voice agent implementation, tuning and testing
howPage.ctaTitle: Ready to implement DeepContact in your operation?
howPage.ctaDesc: Share your use case with our team and we will show you how to automate your contact process quickly and efficiently.
